notes: Core mechanics work but alien movement uses half-width steps making them move too fast horizontally, no shields/barriers, and alien sprites are very basic rectangles rather than recognizable Space Invaders shapes.
A solid, playable clone with good procedural graphics and wave progression, but lacks iconic features like destructible shields and the mystery UFO, and player movement is frame-rate dependent.

Complete and functional basic Space Invaders clone with working start/pause/shooting/waves, but simplistic movement/timing, limited shooting behavior, and no shields or richer arcade feel keep it from scoring higher.
